items.name: Masamichi Y.
items.title: CEO at Perverz

items.question: What is LokaLingo?
items.answer: LokaLingo is an EdTech platform that empowers language educators with AI-powered tools and gives learners a curriculum built from their real conversations. Our core product, The Living Textbook, turns every correction into a personalized learning opportunity.

items.question: How is this different from iTalki, Preply, or Duolingo?
items.answer: Unlike marketplaces that take commissions (up to 60%), Loka charges a flat $6/seat with no revenue sharing. Unlike generic apps, Loka builds a unique curriculum from each learner’s actual conversations — every conversation becomes a lesson.

items.question: What does $6/seat include?
items.answer: Everything: Canvas system, AI-powered assessments, student management, booking system, progress tracking, CEFR levels, and multi-language support (EN/JP/KO). No tiers, no upsells.

items.question: Do I need technical knowledge?
items.answer: Not at all. The platform is designed for educators, not developers. If you can use a web browser, you can use Loka.

items.question: Can I use my own AI tools?
items.answer: Yes! Our BYOK (Bring Your Own Key) feature lets you connect your own OpenAI or Anthropic API keys to extend the platform with custom AI features.

items.question: Do I own my student data?
items.answer: Absolutely. Your data is yours. We never sell, share, or use your student data for training AI models. You can export everything at any time.

items.question: What languages does the platform support?
items.answer: The platform interface is available in English, Japanese, and Korean. You can teach any language — the Canvas and AI tools are language-agnostic.

items.question: What counts as an active seat?
items.answer: An active seat is a student who has at least one booking in the current billing month. Inactive students don’t count.

items.question: Is there a free trial?
items.answer: Yes! Start with a 14-day free trial that includes 1 educator seat and 1 learner seat. No credit card required.

items.question: Can I cancel anytime?
items.answer: Absolutely. No contracts, no lock-in. Cancel your subscription at any time.

items.question: What payment methods do you accept?
items.answer: We accept all major credit cards through Stripe. Payments are processed securely.

cta.title: Ready to keep more of what you earn?

sections.title: The Question That Started Everything
sections.content: No two brains are alike — so why can’t learning be more adaptive? This question drove 23 years of language teaching, thousands of lessons, and countless iterations. The answer became LokaLingo.

sections.title: What’s in a Name?
sections.content: Loka comes from Sanskrit लोक (loka), meaning ‘world’ or ‘place.’ Combined with lingua (Latin for ‘language’), LokaLingo means ‘a world of language’ — a place where every learner’s world shapes their curriculum.

sections.title: The Living Textbook
sections.content: The heart of LokaLingo is The Living Textbook. When a learner speaks in conversation, the teacher captures key moments on the Canvas. AI then transforms those captured moments into personalized review material, quizzes, and spaced repetition. Every conversation becomes a stepping stone.

sections.title: The Three Pillars
sections.content:
Everything we build rests on three pillars:

**Nurture** — A co-active learning environment where mistakes are celebrated, not feared.

**Guide** — CEFR-aligned adaptive assessment that gives learners and educators a clear path forward.

**Accelerate** — AI-powered tools that make practice efficient, targeted, and engaging.

sections.title: Built by Educators, for Educators
sections.content: LokaLingo wasn’t born in a tech incubator. It was born in a classroom. After 23 years running Accent Language School in Japan and delivering over 17,000 lessons, we built the tool we wished existed. The Living Textbook is that tool.

sections.title: The Vision
sections.content: LokaLingo is just the beginning. We’re building toward a platform where every type of learning — languages, leadership, professional skills — benefits from The Living Textbook philosophy. Today it’s language learning. Tomorrow it’s an ecosystem.

hero.title: See Loka in Action
hero.subtitle: Real scenarios showing how The Living Textbook transforms the experience for educators, learners, and schools.

cases.title: Julio teaches 40 students across 3 time zones
cases.challenge: Julio was spending evenings creating custom homework for each student. With 40 learners at different levels, he couldn't keep up — and commission platforms were taking 40% of his income.
cases.solution: With Loka's Canvas, Julio captures moments during each lesson. AI generates personalized review materials automatically. At $6/seat, his 40 students cost $240/month instead of losing $2,400 in commissions.
cases.result: Julio saved 10+ hours per week on material prep, kept 94% of his income, and his students showed measurable CEFR improvement within 3 months.

cases.title: Yuki prepares for IELTS while working full-time
cases.challenge: Yuki tried Duolingo and generic textbooks but plateaued at B1. Generic content didn't address her specific weak points — articles, conditionals, and business vocabulary.
cases.solution: Her teacher captured key moments from Yuki's real conversations. The Living Textbook turned those into targeted quizzes and spaced repetition drills. Every lesson built on the last.
cases.result: Yuki's curriculum was 100% her own. Within 4 months she moved from B1 to B2, specifically improving in the areas she struggled with most.

cases.title: A language school scales from 5 to 15 teachers
cases.challenge: The school director managed schedules, assessments, and student progress across 5 teachers using spreadsheets and 4 different tools. Scaling to 15 teachers seemed impossible without hiring admin staff.
cases.solution: Loka unified everything: bookings, AI-powered 5-dimension assessments, student progress dashboards, and multi-teacher management — all in one platform at $6/seat.
cases.result: The school tripled its teacher count without adding admin overhead. Consistent CEFR-based assessments across all teachers improved parent satisfaction scores.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.content:
This privacy policy describes how LokaLingo 株式会社 (Corporate Number: 6011001118444, hereinafter "the Company") collects, uses, and protects your personal information when you use our website (lokalingo.com) and related services.

## 1. Data Controller

LokaLingo 株式会社 (located at 2-28-3 Sendagaya, Shibuya-ku, Tokyo 151-0051, Japan) is the data controller for personal data collected through this website and the LokaLingo platform.

## 2. Information We Collect

**Information you provide directly:**
- Name, email address, phone number
- Company name, job title
- Billing address
- Username and password
- Messages submitted via contact forms

**Information collected automatically:**
- IP address
- Browser and device characteristics
- Operating system details
- Language preferences
- Referral URLs
- Country and location data
- Service usage patterns and timestamps

**Payment data:** Credit card information is securely stored and processed by Stripe. We do not directly store card numbers or security codes.

## 3. Sensitive Personal Information

We do not intentionally collect or process sensitive personal information (such as race, religion, or health information).

## 4. How We Use Your Information

We use your information to:
- Create and manage your account
- Provide and operate our EdTech platform and services
- Respond to inquiries and provide customer support
- Send administrative notifications
- Process payments and manage subscriptions
- Collect feedback to improve our services
- Send marketing communications (with your consent)
- Ensure platform security and prevent fraud
- Identify usage trends and improve services
- Comply with legal obligations

## 5. Data Sharing

Your personal information may be shared with the following service providers under confidentiality agreements:
- Vercel — Website hosting
- Cloudflare — DNS and CDN services
- Stripe — Payment processing
- Brevo — Email marketing and CRM
- Analytics providers — Aggregated usage analysis

Your data is never sold to third parties. We do not use your content to train AI models.

## 6. Data Retention

Personal information is retained for as long as necessary to fulfill the purposes described in this policy. We will not retain personal data beyond 84 months after account termination, except where required by tax, accounting, or other legal obligations.

## 7. Information Security

We implement appropriate organizational and technical security measures to protect your personal information. However, no internet transmission is 100% secure. You are responsible for maintaining a secure access environment.

## 8. Children's Privacy

We do not intentionally collect data from or sell services to individuals under 18 years of age.

## 9. Your Rights

You have the right to:
- **Access, correct, or delete** your personal information at any time
- **Opt out of marketing** via unsubscribe links in emails or by replying "STOP" to SMS
- **Withdraw consent** for information processing at any time
- **Manage cookies** through your browser settings

**EEA/UK residents:** You may file complaints with your regional data protection authority if you believe we are unlawfully processing your information.

## 10. Cookies and Tracking

We use cookies and similar technologies (web beacons, pixels) to collect and store information. See our [Cookie Policy](/en/cookies) for details.

## 11. Do Not Track

Unified technical standards for recognizing DNT signals are not finalized, so we do not currently respond to DNT browser signals.

## 12. Policy Updates

This privacy policy is updated as needed to comply with relevant laws. Updated versions display a new revision date and become effective immediately upon publication.

## 13. Contact

For privacy inquiries or requests to access, correct, or delete your personal information, contact us at ryan@lokalingo.com.

LokaLingo 株式会社
2-28-3 Sendagaya, Shibuya-ku, Tokyo 151-0051, Japan
Corporate Number: 6011001118444

*Last updated: February 2026*

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.content:
These Terms of Service (hereinafter "Terms") govern your use of the LokaLingo platform and services provided by LokaLingo 株式会社 (Corporate Number: 6011001118444, hereinafter "the Company") through the website lokalingo.com.

## 1. Acceptance of Terms

By accessing this website or using our services, you agree to be bound by these Terms. If you do not agree, please discontinue use immediately. The Company reserves the right to revise these Terms at any time; continued use after changes constitutes acceptance.

## 2. Services

LokaLingo provides an EdTech platform for language educators and learners, including The Living Textbook, AI-powered assessments, and student management tools. Services are delivered online through the platform.

## 3. Intellectual Property

All content on this website and platform — including source code, databases, text, images, audio, video, educational materials, trademarks, and service marks — is owned by or licensed to the Company. Content is provided on an "as-is" basis for personal, non-commercial use only. No part of the platform may be reproduced, republished, uploaded, transmitted, distributed, sold, or otherwise exploited for commercial purposes without prior written permission.

## 4. User Registration

Registration may be required to use certain services. You must provide accurate and current information. You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your password and all activity on your account. You represent that you are at least 18 years old and have the legal capacity to agree to these Terms. Access via automated means or for illegal purposes is prohibited.

## 5. Prohibited Activities

The following are prohibited:
- Commercial use without explicit Company approval
- Systematic data collection without permission (scraping, etc.)
- Circumventing or disabling security features
- Uploading viruses, trojans, or other malicious code
- Impersonating others
- Harassing or disturbing other users
- Interfering with platform functionality
- Attempting to gain unauthorized access to sensitive information

## 6. Pricing and Payment

Current pricing is displayed on the platform. Pricing may change with 30 days notice. Payments are processed securely via Stripe. Credit card information is managed by Stripe; we do not store it directly.

## 7. Your Content

You retain ownership of all content you create on the platform. We do not use your content to train AI models. If you submit content, you warrant that it does not infringe third-party rights and complies with applicable law.

## 8. Feedback and Submissions

Any feedback or suggestions sent to the Company become non-confidential Company property. The Company may freely use such feedback without compensation.

## 9. Third-Party Websites

The platform may contain links to third-party websites. The Company is not responsible for third-party content, accuracy, or policies. Access to external sites is at your own risk.

## 10. Termination

You may cancel your subscription at any time. The Company reserves the right to deny access without notice for violations or any other reason. You may not register a new account under a different name after account termination.

## 11. Modifications and Interruptions

The Company reserves the right to modify, remove, or discontinue platform content or the entire service without notice. Continuous availability is not guaranteed. The Company is not liable for downtime or service interruptions.

## 12. Disclaimer

The platform and services are provided "as-is." To the maximum extent permitted by law, the Company disclaims all express or implied warranties, including merchantability and fitness for a particular purpose. The Company is not responsible for errors, injuries, property damage, unauthorized access, transmission interruptions, viruses, or content errors.

## 13. Limitation of Liability

The Company is not liable for indirect, consequential, or punitive damages, even if aware of their possibility. Liability is capped at the lesser of amounts paid during the preceding six months or ¥100,000.

## 14. Indemnification

You agree to defend and indemnify the Company and its officers, agents, and employees from losses arising from your use of the platform, violations of these Terms, infringement of third-party rights, or harm to other users.

## 15. Governing Law and Dispute Resolution

These Terms are governed by the laws of Japan. In the event of a dispute, the parties shall first attempt 30 days of informal negotiation. If unresolved, the Tokyo District Court shall have exclusive jurisdiction. Class action proceedings are prohibited. Intellectual property enforcement and injunctive relief are exceptions.

## 16. User Data

The Company maintains data for platform performance, but you bear sole responsibility for submitted data. The Company is not liable for data loss or corruption.

## 17. Electronic Communications

You consent to electronic communications, which satisfy legal written-communication requirements. You accept electronic signatures and records and waive rights requiring original signatures or non-electronic delivery.

## 18. General Provisions

These Terms constitute the complete agreement between the parties. Failure to enforce rights does not constitute waiver. If any provision is found illegal or unenforceable, it is severable; remaining provisions remain valid. No joint venture, partnership, employment, or agency relationship arises from these Terms.

## 19. Contact

For questions about these Terms: ryan@lokalingo.com

LokaLingo 株式会社
2-28-3 Sendagaya, Shibuya-ku, Tokyo 151-0051, Japan
Corporate Number: 6011001118444

*Last updated: February 2026*

cookies.title: Cookie Policy
cookies.content:
This policy explains how LokaLingo 株式会社 (Corporate Number: 6011001118444) uses cookies and similar technologies on lokalingo.com. It describes what these technologies are, why we use them, and your rights regarding their use.

## What Are Cookies

Cookies are small data files placed on your computer or mobile device when you visit a website. They are widely used to enable website functionality, improve efficiency, and provide reporting information. **First-party cookies** are set by the website operator. **Third-party cookies** are set by external parties for advertising, interactive content, analytics, and other purposes.

## Why We Use Cookies

- **Essential cookies:** Required for the technical operation of the website
- **Performance and functionality cookies:** Enhance website functionality and security
- **Analytics and customization cookies:** Track usage patterns and improve user experience

## Cookies We Use

### Essential Cookies

| Name | Purpose | Duration |
|------|---------|----------|
| NEXT_LOCALE | Remembers your selected display language | 1 year |
| Authentication tokens | Manages your login session | Session |

### Analytics Cookies

| Name | Purpose | Type |
|------|---------|------|
| Vercel Analytics | Aggregated website performance and usage analysis | Analytics tracker |

## Web Beacons and Similar Technologies

Web beacons (tracking pixels or clear GIFs) are small graphic files with unique identifiers that recognize users when accessing the website or opening emails. They monitor traffic patterns, deliver cookies, measure advertising effectiveness, and assess email marketing success.

## Managing Cookies

You have the right to accept or reject cookies. Essential cookies cannot be refused as they are necessary for the website to function. All other cookies can be managed through your browser settings.

Rejecting cookies may limit some website features, though the site remains usable. You can also opt out of targeted advertising at [aboutads.info/choices](https://aboutads.info/choices) or [youronlinechoices.com](https://youronlinechoices.com).

## Policy Updates

This Cookie Policy is updated periodically to reflect changes in cookie usage, operations, or legal and regulatory requirements. Please check this policy regularly for the latest information.

## Contact

For questions about our use of cookies: ryan@lokalingo.com

LokaLingo 株式会社
2-28-3 Sendagaya, Shibuya-ku, Tokyo 151-0051, Japan
Corporate Number: 6011001118444

*Last updated: February 2026*
